message:
fix: compaction event now emits fullSummary including log path prefix

compactHistory was returning the raw LLM summary text, but pushing the
full summary (with log path prefix) into history. This caused the
session-controller and resume path to reconstruct history with a
different summary than what the agent actually used. Now the return
value includes the prefix, matching what goes into the agent's history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
